Title: Verify adding a beneficiary with valid details
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Beneficiary Management screen
Step 2: Click on 'Add Beneficiary' button
Step 3: Enter a valid account number
Step 4: Enter a valid IFSC code
Step 5: Enter beneficiary name
Step 6: Click 'Save'
Step 7: Verify beneficiary appears in the list
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is added successfully and a success toast is displayed

Title: Verify successful money transfer to an existing beneficiary
Precondition: User is logged in and has at least one beneficiary
Steps:
Step 1: Open Transfer screen
Step 2: Select a beneficiary from the list
Step 3: Enter transfer amount within limits (e.g., 5000)
Step 4: Click 'Continue'
Step 5: Enter received OTP
Step 6: Click 'Confirm'
Step 7: Observe confirmation message
Expected_Result: Transfer succeeds, confirmation message is shown and transaction appears in history

Title: Verify OTP verification flow works for a transfer
Precondition: User is logged in and has a beneficiary selected
Steps:
Step 1: Initiate a transfer and enter a valid amount
Step 2: Click 'Continue' to trigger OTP generation
Step 3: Receive OTP on registered mobile
Step 4: Enter the correct OTP
Step 5: Click 'Confirm'
Step 6: Verify success notification
Expected_Result: Transfer is completed after correct OTP entry

Title: Verify system rejects beneficiary with invalid account number format
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Add Beneficiary screen
Step 2: Enter an invalid account number (e.g., ABC123)
Step 3: Enter a valid IFSC code
Step 4: Enter beneficiary name
Step 5: Click 'Save'
Step 6: Observe validation message
Expected_Result: Error message displayed: 'Account number must be numeric and 10‑16 digits'

Title: Verify transfer fails when amount exceeds the maximum limit
Precondition: User is logged in and has a beneficiary
Steps:
Step 1: Open Transfer screen
Step 2: Select a beneficiary
Step 3: Enter amount greater than ₹1,00,000 (e.g., 150000)
Step 4: Click 'Continue'
Step 5: Observe error message
Expected_Result: Error message displayed: 'Transfer amount exceeds limit of ₹1,00,000'

Title: Verify transfer of the minimum allowed amount succeeds
Precondition: User is logged in and has a beneficiary
Steps:
Step 1: Open Transfer screen
Step 2: Select a beneficiary
Step 3: Enter the minimum amount ₹1
Step 4: Click 'Continue'
Step 5: Enter valid OTP
Step 6: Click 'Confirm'
Step 7: Verify success notification
Expected_Result: Transfer of ₹1 is processed successfully and appears in transaction history

Title: Verify transaction is cancelled after three consecutive OTP failures
Precondition: User is logged in and has a beneficiary selected
Steps:
Step 1: Initiate a transfer and enter a valid amount
Step 2: Click 'Continue' to request OTP
Step 3: Enter an incorrect OTP and click 'Confirm'
Step 4: Repeat step 3 two more times with wrong OTPs
Step 5: Observe system response after third failure
Expected_Result: Error message displayed: 'OTP attempts exceeded, transaction cancelled' and no transaction is recorded

Title: Verify Transaction History API returns the newly transferred transaction
Precondition: User has performed a successful transfer via UI
Steps:
Step 1: Capture transaction details (amount, beneficiary, timestamp) from UI
Step 2: Send GET request to /api/transactions with valid auth token
Step 3: Parse JSON response
Step 4: Verify response contains a transaction matching the captured details
Expected_Result: API response includes the recent transaction with correct amount and beneficiary name

Title: Verify adding a new beneficiary with valid account number and IFSC
Precondition: User is logged in and on Beneficiary Management page
Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to Add Beneficiary form
Step 2: Enter a valid beneficiary name
Step 3: Enter a numeric account number between 10-16 digits
Step 4: Enter a valid IFSC code
Step 5: Click the Save button
Expected_Result: Beneficiary is saved successfully and appears in the beneficiary list

Title: Verify successful money transfer within allowed amount range
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select an existing beneficiary
Step 2: Enter a transfer amount of 5000
Step 3: Click Proceed to request OTP
Step 4: Enter a valid OTP received
Step 5: Click Confirm Transfer
Expected_Result: Transfer completes, success message is displayed and balance is updated

Title: Verify success notification is shown after a completed transfer
Precondition: User has completed a transfer successfully
Steps:
Step 1: Observe the UI after confirming the transfer
Step 2: Locate the notification toast/message area
Step 3: Verify the message text
Expected_Result: Notification displays "Transfer successful" with green styling

Title: Verify adding beneficiary fails when account number is non-numeric
Precondition: User is logged in and on Add Beneficiary form
Steps:
Step 1: Enter beneficiary name
Step 2: Enter account number containing alphabetic characters (e.g., ABCD1234)
Step 3: Enter a valid IFSC code
Step 4: Click Save
Expected_Result: Form shows validation error "Account number must be numeric and 10‑16 digits" and beneficiary is not saved

Title: Verify transfer is blocked when amount exceeds the maximum limit
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select a beneficiary
Step 2: Enter transfer amount of 150000 (greater than ₹100,000)
Step 3: Click Proceed
Step 4: Observe validation message
Expected_Result: System displays error "Amount exceeds allowed limit of ₹100,000" and does not request OTP

Title: Verify transfer works with minimum and maximum allowed amounts
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select a beneficiary
Step 2: Enter transfer amount of 1 (minimum allowed)
Step 3: Click Proceed, enter valid OTP, and confirm
Step 4: Verify success notification
Step 5: Repeat steps 1‑4 with amount 100000 (maximum allowed)
Expected_Result: Both transfers complete successfully with appropriate success messages

Title: Verify OTP verification blocks transfer when OTP is incorrect
Precondition: User is logged in, beneficiary exists, and on Transfer Money page
Steps:
Step 1: Select the beneficiary
Step 2: Enter a valid transfer amount (5000)
Step 3: Click Proceed to request OTP
Step 4: Enter an incorrect OTP (000000)
Step 5: Click Confirm Transfer
Step 6: Observe error message
Expected_Result: Transfer is not completed and error message "Invalid OTP" is displayed

Title: Verify transaction history API returns the recent transfer record
Precondition: A successful transfer has been made earlier in the session
Steps:
Step 1: Send GET request to /api/transactions?userId=USER123
Step 2: Receive JSON response
Step 3: Validate that the latest entry matches the recent transfer details (amount, beneficiary, status)
Expected_Result: API returns a list containing the newly created transaction with correct details and status "Success"
